universe._cap_class: small-mid, descriptive only — min_price/max_price are what actually filter

risk._trailing_stop_source: 2026-07-20 guardrail engine — ratchets up from peak price since entry, mechanically enforced in scripts/guardrails.py check-stops, not LLM-judgment
risk._duplicate_order_source: 2026-07-22 — DVN got bought 3x in one tick (three separate orders 5-7s apart). 60s cooldown blocks a same-ticker/same-action repeat submission without blocking legitimate cross-tick re-entries (ticks are 5min apart).
risk._drawdown_source: 2026-07-23 — competition mode's circuit breaker (paper-trading-rebuild/COMPETITION.md's >15%/>20% framework, adapted). Measured from peak equity (state/peak_equity.json), not starting capital. Blocks new BUYs only — SELLs (including stop-losses) always pass, since blocking an exit at the worst moment can only make a drawdown worse. drawdown_halt_pct is a harder stop than pause but same BUY-only scope; see gate_drawdown_circuit_breaker.

risk_guards._source: kairos — concentration/rogue-trading guards. max_holding_days (v1.2 time-stop) removed 2026-07-23: v1.3 dropped the time-stop as a strategy rule and nothing in executor.py ever read it from here.

guardrail_gates._note: 2026-07-20 guardrail engine — flip any gate to false to disable it without touching code. scripts/executor.py reads this every run. bankroll gate added 2026-07-21: wires bankroll.py's win/loss-adaptive ceiling into real position sizing (see bankroll.md for current ceiling). position_size_trim added 2026-07-22: mechanically force-trims a position that's grown over max_position_pct via price appreciation, since gate_position_size only blocks NEW over-cap buys — NVDA sat over cap 4 days before this existed. order_count_audit added 2026-07-23: strategy.md promised a daily order-count audit (risk_guards) since v1.0 that nothing ever mechanically enforced — found dead by workspace_review.py. drawdown_circuit_breaker added 2026-07-23: competition-mode portfolio-level circuit breaker, see risk._drawdown_source.
